(ii) “तिमलनाडु” शीष榁क और इसके अंतग榁त आने वाली 灹िवि玗य犘 के प玑ात, िन玈िलिखत को अंतः瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, नामतः- ‘‘‘‘‘‘‘‘तेलंगाना तेलंगाना तेलंगाना तेलंगाना रा榖य रा榖य रा榖य रा榖य सरकार के अधीन व琇र瀠ठ सरकार के अधीन व琇र瀠ठ सरकार के अधीन व琇र瀠ठ सरकार के अधीन व琇र瀠ठ 獗ूटी पद 獗ूटी पद 獗ूटी पद 獗ूटी पद 61 61 61 61 पुिलस महािनदेशक (पुिलस बल के अ瀇य楹) 1 अपर पुिलस महािनदेशक 5 पुिलस महािनरी楹क 13 उप पुिलस महािनरी楹क 11 पुिलस अधी楹क 31 1. कुल व琇र瀠ठ कुल व琇र瀠ठ कुल व琇र瀠ठ कुल व琇र瀠ठ 獗ूटी पद 獗ूटी पद 獗ूटी पद 獗ूटी पद 61 61 61 61 2. के瀈灶ीय 灹ितिनयुि猴 琇रजव榁 उपयु榁猴 मद 1 का अिधकतम 40% 24 24 24 24 3. रा榖य 灹ितिनयुि猴 琇रजव榁 उपयु榁猴 मद 1 का अिधकतम 25% 15 15 15 15 4. 灹िश楹ण 琇रजव榁 उपयु榁猴 मद 1 का अिधकतम 3.5% 2222 5. छु獉ी 琇रजव榁 और किन瀠ठ पद 琇रजव榁 उपयु榁猴 मद 1 का अिधकतम 16.5% 10 10 10 10 6. भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा (भत牸) िनयमावली, 1954 के िनयम 8 के अधीन पदो瀈नित 獧ारा भरे जाने वाले पद उपयु榁榉त मद 1,2,3 और 4 के 33.3% से अिधक नह牷 34 34 34 34 7. सीधी भत牸 獧ारा भरे जाने वाले पद (1+2+3+4+5-6) 78 78 78 78 कुल 灹ािधकृत सं榐या कुल 灹ािधकृत सं榐या कुल 灹ािधकृत सं榐या कुल 灹ािधकृत सं榐या 112 112 112 112’’.’’.’’.’’. [फा. सं. 11052/1/2014-अ.भा.से.-II(क)] 琈दवाकर नाथ िम炈ा, िनदेशक (सेवाएं) -- 2 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 13 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी ((((1111):):):): इस अिधसूचना के जारी होने से पूव榁, भारतीय पुिलस सेवा आं灷 灹देश संवग榁 क琉 कुल 灹ािधकृत पद सं榐या 258 थी । 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पणी णी णी णी ((((2222):):):): मु榐य िविनयम 琈दनांक 22.10.1955 क琉 एस.आर.ओ. सं. 3350 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे । त瀄प瀙चात् भारतीय पुिलस सेवा के आं灷 灹देश संवग榁 के संबंध म犆 िन瀓निलिखत सा.का.िन. सं榐या猒 तथा ितिथय犘 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कए गए : 灙 灙 灙 灙....सं संसं सं.... सा सा सा सा....का का का का....िन िन िन िन....सं संसं सं.... तारीख तारीख तारीख तारीख 灙 灙 灙 灙....सं संसं सं.... सा सा सा सा....का का का का....िन िन िन िन....सं संसं सं.... तारीख तारीख तारीख तारीख 1 856 (अ) 30.11.1976 10. 100 20.02.1993 2 1536 12.11.1977 11. 446 11.09.1992 3 580 (अ) 19.10.1979 12. 385 30.07.1994 4 396 18.04.1981 13. 320 (अ) 31.03.1995 5 623 (अ) 21.10.1982 14. 187 12.04.1997 6 344 (अ) 20.04.1983 15. 208 (अ) 24.04.1998 7 787 28.07.1984 16. 422 13.12.2003 8 999 31.12.1988 17. 192 (अ) 24.03.2009 9 193 25.03.1989 18. 509 (अ) 16.06.2010 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th July, 2014 G.S.R. 513(E).– In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951) and Sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 76 of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 (6 of 2014), read with the first proviso to sub-rule (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Police Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954 and the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Andhra Pradesh, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:- 1. (1) These regulations may be called the Indian Police Service (Fixation of cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the schedule,– (i) for the heading “Andhra Pradesh” and the entries occurring thereunder, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “Andhra Pradesh Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 79 Director General of Police (Head of Police Force) 1 Director General of Police 1 Additional Director General of Police 7 -- 3 of 8 -- 14 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Inspector General of Police 17 Deputy Inspector General of Police 13 Superintendent of Police 40 1 Total Senior Duty Posts 79 2 Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 31 3 State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of Item 1 above 19 4 Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of Item 1 above 2 5 Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 13 6 Posts to be filled by promotion under rule 9 of the Indian Police Service (Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33.3% of Item 1, 2, 3 and 4 above 43 7 Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 101 Total Authorised Strength 144”; (ii) after the heading “Tamil Nadu” and the entries occurring thereunder, the following shall be inserted, namely:— “Telangana Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 61 Director General of Police (Head of Police Force) 1 Additional Director General of Police 5 Inspector General of Police 13 Deputy Inspector General of Police 11 Superintendent of Police 31 1 Total Senior Duty Posts 61 2 Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 24 3 State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of Item 1 above 15 4 Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of Item 1 above 2 5 Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 10 6 Posts to be filled by promotion under rule 9 of the Indian Police Service (Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33.3% of Item 1, 2, 3 and 4 above 34 7 Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 78 Total Authorised Strength 112”. [F. No. 11052/1/2014-AIS-II (A)] DIWAKAR NATH MISRA, Director (Services) -- 4 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 15 Note 1: Prior to the issue of this notification, the Total Authorised Strength of Andhra Pradesh Indian Police service Cadre was 258. Note 2: The principal regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide S.R.O. number 3350, dated 22.10.1955. Subsequently, they were amended in respect of the Andhra Pradesh Cadre of Indian Police Service vide following G.S.R. numbers and dates:- Sl.No. G.S.R. No. Date Sl.No. G.S.R. (1) इन िनयम犘 को भारतीय पुिलस सेवा (वेतन) संशोधन िनयमावली, 2014 कहा जा सकेगा । (2) ये िनयम शासक琉य राजप灴 म犆 इनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे । 2. भारतीय पुिलस सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2007 क琉 अनुसूची II म犆, - (i) रा榖य सरकार犘 के अधीन भारतीय पुिलस सेवा म犆 समय वेतनमान से अिधक वेतन वाले पद犘 से संबंिधत भाग क क琉 तािलका म犆,- (क) 灹थम कॉलम म犆 आने वाली ‘आं灷 灹देश’, 灹िवि玗 तथा ि獧तीय कॉलम म犆 तदनु牲पी 灹िवि玗 के िलए िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, नामत: :- ‘‘‘‘‘‘‘‘आं灷 आं灷 आं灷 आं灷 灹देश 灹देश 灹देश 灹देश पुिलस महािनदेशक (पुिलस बल के अ瀇य楹) 牱पए 80,000(िनयत) पुिलस महािनदेशक एचएजी+75500 (3% क琉 दर से वा琔षक वेतन वृि獳) 80,000 अपर पुिलस महािनदेशक एचएजी 67000 (3% क琉 दर से वा琔षक वेतन वृि獳) 79,000 पुिलस महािनरी楹क पीबी-4+灡ेड वेतन 10,000 牱. उप पुिलस महािनरी楹क पीबी-4+灡ेड वेतन 8,900 牱.’’,’’,’’,’’, -- 5 of 8 -- 16 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (ख) 灹थम कॉलम म犆 आने वाली ‘तिमलनाडु’ 灹िवि玗 तथा ि獧तीय कॉलम म犆 तदनु牲पी 灹िवि玗 के िलए िन瀓निलिखत जोड़ा जाएगा, नामत: :— ‘‘‘‘‘‘‘‘तेलंगाना तेलंगाना तेलंगाना तेलंगाना पुिलस महािनदेशक (पुिलस बल के अ瀇य楹) 牱पए 80,000 (िनयत) अपर पुिलस महािनदेशक एचएजी 67000 (3% क琉 दर से वा琔षक वेतन वृि獳) 79,000 पुिलस महािनरी楹क पीबी-4+灡ेड वेतन 10,000 牱. उप पुिलस महािनरी楹क पीबी-4+灡ेड वेतन 8,900 牱.’’’’’,’,’,’, (ii) रा榖य सरकार犘 के अधीन वेतन के अित琇र榉त िवशेष भ瀄ता वाले पद犘 सिहत भारतीय पुिलस सेवा के व琇र瀠ठ वेतनमान वाले पद犘 से संबंिधत भाग ख म犆, तािलका म犆,- (क) ‘‘‘‘‘‘‘‘आं灷 आं灷 आं灷 आं灷 灹देश 灹देश 灹देश 灹देश’’’’’’’’ 灹िवि玗 के िलए िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, नामत: :- ‘‘पुिलस अधी楹क’’; ““““तेलंगाना तेलंगाना तेलंगाना तेलंगाना (ख) ‘‘तिमलनाडु’’ 灹िवि玗 के िलए िन瀓निलिखत जोड़ा जाएगा, नामत : :- पुिलस अधी楹क’”. G.S.R. 514(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Andhra Pradesh hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Police Service (Pay) Amendment Rules, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Police Service (Pay) Rules, 2007, in Schedule II,— (i) in Part A relating to posts carrying pay above the senior scale of pay of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments, in the table,— (a) for the entry “Andhra Pradesh” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted, namely :— “Andhra Pradesh Director General of Police (Head of Police Force) Rs.80,000/-( fixed) Director General of Police HAG+75500 (annual increment @3%) 80,000 Additional Director General of Police HAG 67000 (annual increment @3%)79,000 Inspector General of Police PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000 Deputy Inspector General of Police PB-4+ GP Rs.8,900, -- 7 of 8 -- 18 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (b) after the entry “Tamil Nadu” appearing in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be inserted, namely:- “Telangana Director General of Police (Head of Police Force) Rs.80,000/-( fixed) Additional Director General of Police HAG 67000/-(annual increment @3%)79,000 Inspector General of Police PB-4+ GP Rs.10,000 Deputy Inspector General of Police PB-4+ GP Rs.8,900; (ii) in Part B relating to Posts carrying pay in the senior scale of the Indian Police Service under the State Governments including posts carrying special allowance in addition to pay, in the table,– (a) for the entries occurring under “Andhra Pradesh”, the following shall be substituted, namely:- Superintendent of Police”; (b) after the entries relating to “Tamil Nadu”, the following shall be inserted, namely:- “TELANGANA Superintendent of Police”. [F. No. 11052/1/2014-AIS-II (B)] DIWAKAR NATH MISRA, Director (Services) Note : The principal rules were published in the Extraordinary, Gazette of India, vide G.S.R. number 108(E), dated 21.02.2008 and subsequently amended vide following G.S.R. numbers and dates:-.
